segments.text: so unfortunately here I think this is very shocking if you know this guy's face very well and when I saw the before then it made sense and the reason is he's actually got quite a rounded features so if you have a look at his chin it's a relatively round chin uh he's his General overall lower face was round and has suddenly become really chiseled so there's a square of chin he has this Shadow over here which is quite marked it's over defined and that is associated when you get a lot of change quickly with rapid weight loss with illness and I know a lot of people are saying that he looks a bit ill and I would say that's probably why though I don't know exactly what he's had done looks like Buckle fat pad removal and maybe some structuring treatment it is chin and jawline but it's quite a lot of masculinization and squareness for someone who actually has round features and I think that's what's causing this harmony do you think it was a good move to do that on him the show answer is no because everyone's responding in a way that is not good for him he didn't want this response that's for sure so it should have been done in a gentler way the longer answer is it really does depend on how it's what his backstory

was what he thought about his face and whether this is making him feel more confident or not and whether in the fullness of time when people get used to it it'll be better for him or not I don't really know that for sure but you can say too much was done too quickly for someone who's in the public eye

transcript: so unfortunately here I think this is very shocking if you know this guy's face very well and when I saw the before then it made sense and the reason is he's actually got quite a rounded features so if you have a look at his chin it's a relatively round chin uh he's his General overall lower face was round and has suddenly become really chiseled so there's a square of chin he has this Shadow over here which is quite marked it's over defined and that is associated when you get a lot of change quickly with rapid weight loss with illness and I know a lot of people are saying that he looks a bit ill and I would say that's probably why though I don't know exactly what he's had done looks like Buckle fat pad removal and maybe some structuring treatment it is chin and jawline but it's quite a lot of masculinization and squareness for someone who actually has round features and I think that's what's causing this harmony do you think it was a good move to do that on him the show answer is no because everyone's responding in a way that is not good for him he didn't want this response that's for sure so it should have been done in a gentler way the longer answer is it really does depend on how it's what his backstory was what he thought about his face and whether this is making him feel more confident or not and whether in the fullness of time when people get used to it it'll be better for him or not I don't really know that for sure but you can say too much was done too quickly for someone who's in the public eye
